18.reason: [Error: Condition should check arr[i-1] < 'z' and arr[i+1] > 'a' with inclusive bounds; also missing check that both characters are same type and arr[i+1] > arr[i-1]]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.1 , reason:  [Error: Condition should check arr[i-1] < 'z' and arr[i+1] > 'a' with inclusive bounds; also missing check that both characters are same type and arr[i+1] > arr[i-1]]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.1 , reason:  [Error: The condition uses '<' and '>' incorrectly; should be '<=' and '>=' to include the endpoints. Also, the logic for expansion is flawed; it should check that both characters are in the same range and that the second is greater than the first.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1 , reason:  Logical error: Out-of-bounds access when i=0; range '<'z'' excludes 'z'; should check arr[i+1] > arr[i-1] for expansion.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.1 , reason:  Logical error: Skips printing the starting character arr[i-1]; expansion should include both endpoints.
